languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

languages.text: "Я думал, что мне удастся принести пользу Империуму, сотворив настоящих праведников. Но я не учел, что у каждого человека в Империуме уже есть своя роль и функция. Как части машины, работающие сообразно своему предназначению, люди, что выполняют свою функцию — уже праведны. Это неопровержимый факт. Попытка собрать из них что-то новое лишает их функциональности и, соответственно, духовной чистоты. Я сотворил грех изобретения, но с людьми — за что уже назначил себе соответствующую епитимью".

"I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

languages.text: 「私は、完璧な正義の人間を作り出すことで帝国に貢献できると考えていた。しかし、帝国の人間一人一人には、すでに役割と機能があることを考慮していなかった。機械の部品のように、それぞれの目的を果たすために働く人々。その機能を果たす人たちは、すでに正義である。これは、否定できない事実である。彼らを新しいものに変えようとすることは、彼らから機能を奪い、結果として精神的な純粋さを奪うことになる。私は、革新という罪を犯した。しかし、人間に対しては、すでに適切な罰を自分に課している。」
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating perfect righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、完璧な正義の人間を作り出すことで帝国に貢献できると考えていた。しかし、帝国の人間一人一人には、すでに役割と機能があることを考慮していなかった。機械の部品のように、それぞれの目的を果たすために働く人々。その機能を果たす人たちは、すでに正義である。これは、否定できない事実である。彼らを新しいものに変えようとすることは、彼らから機能を奪い、結果として精神的な純粋さを奪うことになる。私は、革新という罪を犯した。しかし、人間に対しては、すでに適切な罰を自分に課している。」

languages.text: “我曾以为，创造出真正正义的人便能造福帝国。但我没有考虑到，帝国中的每个人本就有其角色与功能。就像机器中的组件，每个部件都在履行自己的职责，能完成其职能的人便已是正义的人。这是不争的事实。试图将他们重新组装成别的东西，只会剥夺他们的功能，进而剥夺他们灵魂上的纯粹。我犯了妄图创新的过错，而且对象还是人类。为此，我已经给自己安排了相应的赎罪忏悔。”
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

traits.locale_text: “我曾以为，创造出真正正义的人便能造福帝国。但我没有考虑到，帝国中的每个人本就有其角色与功能。就像机器中的组件，每个部件都在履行自己的职责，能完成其职能的人便已是正义的人。这是不争的事实。试图将他们重新组装成别的东西，只会剥夺他们的功能，进而剥夺他们灵魂上的纯粹。我犯了妄图创新的过错，而且对象还是人类。为此，我已经给自己安排了相应的赎罪忏悔。”

languages.text: « Je pensais agir dans l'intérêt de l'Imperium en créant des serviteurs vraiment vertueux, mais j'avais oublié que chacun des sujets de l'Empereur avait déjà un rôle propre. Comme les composants d'une machine, qui remplissent tous une fonction bien définie, les individus qui s'acquittent de leur tâche sont vertueux par définition. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. En les assemblant pour former une entité nouvelle, je les priverais de leur rôle d'origine et, par conséquent, de leur pureté spirituelle. J'ai commis la transgression de l'innovation, avec des êtres humains, qui plus est. Je me suis déjà imposé la pénitence appropriée à cette faute grave. »
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

Comme les composants d'une machine, qui remplissent tous une fonction bien définie, les individus qui s'acquittent de leur tâche sont vertueux par définition. Il s'agit là d'un fait indéniable. En les assemblant pour former une entité nouvelle, je les priverais de leur rôle d'origine et, par conséquent, de leur pureté spirituelle. J'ai commis la transgression de l'innovation, avec des êtres humains, qui plus est. Je me suis déjà imposé la pénitence appropriée à cette faute grave. »

languages.text: «Creí que podría beneficiar al Imperium creando personas verdaderamente virtuosas, pero no consideré que cada súbdito del Imperium ya tiene un papel y una función. Como los componentes de una máquina, cada uno con su propio propósito, la gente que cumple con su deber ya es virtuosa. Esto es un hecho incuestionable. Tratar de combinarla en algo nuevo le arrebata su función y, en consecuencia, de su pureza espiritual. He cometido la transgresión de la innovación, pero con seres humanos, por lo que ya me he asignado un castigo apropiado».
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

languages.text: "Gerçekten dürüst insanlar yaratarak İmparatorluk'a fayda sağlayabileceğimi düşünmüştüm. Ancak İmparatorluk'taki her insanın zaten bir rolü ve işlevi olduğunu hesaba katmadım. Tıpkı bir makinenin parçaları gibi her biri kendi amacı doğrultusunda çalışan, işlevlerini yerine getiren insanlar zaten dürüsttür. Bu su götürmez bir gerçektir. Onları yeni bir şey hâlinde bir araya getirmeye çalışmak, onları işlevselliklerinden ve dolayısıyla ruhani saflıklarından mahrum bırakır. İnsanlar üzerinde inovasyon ihlalini işledim ve bunun için kendime uygun bir kefaret biçtim bile."
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."

Tıpkı bir makinenin parçaları gibi her biri kendi amacı doğrultusunda çalışan, işlevlerini yerine getiren insanlar zaten dürüsttür. Bu su götürmez bir gerçektir. Onları yeni bir şey hâlinde bir araya getirmeye çalışmak, onları işlevselliklerinden ve dolayısıyla ruhani saflıklarından mahrum bırakır. İnsanlar üzerinde inovasyon ihlalini işledim ve bunun için kendime uygun bir kefaret biçtim bile."

languages.text: "Ich dachte, ich könnte dem Imperium durch die Erschaffung wahrhaft rechtschaffener Menschen helfen. Allerdings hatte ich nicht bedacht, dass alle Bewohner des Imperiums bereits eine Rolle und Funktion erfüllen. Wie Komponenten einer Maschine, die einem gemeinsamen Zweck dienen, sind Menschen, die ihre Pflicht erfüllen, bereits rechtschaffen. Das ist eine unumstößliche Tatsache. Jeder Versuch, etwas Neues aus ihnen zu formen, beraubt sie ihrer Funktionalität und damit unweigerlich ihrer spirituellen Reinheit. Ich habe mich des Verbrechens der Innovation mit menschlichen Wesen schuldig gemacht, wofür ich mir selbst bereits eine angemessen Buße auferlegt habe."
languages.original_text: "I thought I could benefit the Imperium by creating truly righteous people. But I did not consider that each person in the Imperium already has a role and function. Like components in a machine, each working according to its purpose, people who fulfil their function are already righteous. This is an incontrovertible fact. Trying to assemble them into something new robs them of their functionality and, consequently, of their spiritual purity. I have committed the transgression of innovation, but with human beings, for which I have already assigned myself appropriate penance."
